insurance.description: Pre-built insurance scenario with claims, policies, customers and communications data.
insurance.landing_text: You can ask questions around customer policies, claims and communications.

retail.description: Pre-built retail scenario with products, orders, customers, and inventory data.
retail.landing_text: You can ask questions around sales, products and orders.

default.description: Default telecommunications scenario with network operations data (small).
default.landing_text: You can ask questions around network operations and outages.

default_large.description: Default telecommunications scenario with expanded network operations data (large).
default_large.landing_text: You can ask questions around network operations and outages.
